ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Clustering algorithm used (e.g., k-means, hierarchical) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encodings" (
  "encoding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encoding scheme */,
  "encoding_name" TEXT /* Name of the encoding scheme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the encoding scheme */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the encoding scheme was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the encoding scheme was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encoding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold value */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold value */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the threshold value was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the threshold value was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used */,
  "encoding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding scheme used */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threshold value used */,
  "precision_score" REAL /* Precision score of the model */,
  "recall_score" REAL /* Recall score of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "cluster_n" INTEGER /* Number of clusters */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who performed the evaluation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., 'in_progress', 'completed', 'failed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_encoding_id FOREIGN KEY ("encoding_id") REFERENCES encodings ("encoding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES thresholds ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who performed the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of version creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of version creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encoding_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "encoding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding scheme */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of version creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encoding_versions_encoding_id FOREIGN KEY ("encoding_id") REFERENCES encodings ("encoding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threshold_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threshold value */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of version creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threshold_versions_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES thresholds ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of version creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_versions_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of comment creation */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_tags" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag assigned to the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., 'evaluationcreated', 'commentadded') */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the notification is enabled or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
